overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking along a New York City sidewalk at night. The scene features urban architecture with tall office buildings, street lighting, pedestrians in winter clothing, and light vehicle traffic.

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a green subway railing

notable_agents.action: woman in black winter coat walking opposite direction, passing Spider-Man
pedestrian in business suit walking opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: green metal railing marking a subway entrance staircase
tall street lamp with glowing light illuminating the sidewalk
tall modern glass and steel office towers lining the street

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a city sidewalk at night next to a green subway entrance railing. The street is lined with tall office buildings and illuminated by street lamps. Pedestrians in winter clothing walk in the opposite direction, passing the player character.

events.description: passing the green subway railing into the open sidewalk section with storefronts and garbage bags

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past black garbage bags and retail storefronts

entered.detail: large black garbage bags piled on the sidewalk next to the street
retail store with illuminated 'd'mobile' signage and glass display windows

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a commercial sidewalk section featuring a mobile phone store with illuminated signage on the right. Black garbage bags line the left side of the walkway. Spider-Man continues walking forward as the subway entrance recedes behind him.

events.description: Spider-Man steps off the curb and begins crossing the street at the marked crosswalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the multi-lane street at the crosswalk, passing a stopped silver sedan

notable_agents.action: silver sedan stopped at the intersection waiting for the traffic light

entered.detail: painted white zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
traffic signal pole with illuminated lights at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man approaches and enters a street intersection, stepping onto the marked crosswalk. A silver sedan is stopped at the light to the left. The mobile store recedes into the background on the right as the character crosses the asphalt street toward the opposite sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling New York City sidewalk at night that eventually leads into a street intersection. It begins with Spider-Man walking past a green subway entrance railing, flanked by towering office buildings and pedestrians dressed in winter clothing. As the subway entrance recedes, the environment shifts toward a commercial stretch featuring a brightly lit mobile phone store on the right and black garbage bags lining the left. The scene then opens up as the character approaches a street corner, stepping onto a marked crosswalk while a silver sedan waits at the light. Finally, the camera follows him across the asphalt street, leaving the storefronts behind as he moves toward the opposite sidewalk.
